# Studio Bosko

Studio Bosko is a full-scope residential interior design studio based in Berlin, Germany, working across Europe. Founded by Kasia Kronberger. Recognised as AD100 Polska 2025.

## Services

Interior architecture, space planning, finish and fixture specifications, construction drawings, bespoke furniture specifications, furniture selection and procurement, art sourcing and interior curation, budget planning, project supervision.

## Locations

Based in Berlin and Warsaw. Projects across Germany, Poland, Austria, and Europe internationally.

## Languages

English: https://bosko.studio
German: https://bosko.studio/de/
Polish: https://bosko.studio/pl/

## Projects

- Chroma Penthouse — Berlin Kreuzberg, 143m², interior design and curation
- Zander Rooftop — Berlin Mitte/Kreuzberg, 170m², complex renovation and curation
- Casa Norte — Szczecin, Poland, interior design
- Time Travel — Berlin, interior design
- Haus Giebelgarten — Berlin South, interior design and curation
- Westend Rose — Berlin Charlottenburg, complex renovation
- Wilhelm Lane — Berlin, full-scope curation
- Side to Side — Berlin, interior design
- Ballet School — Berlin Kreuzberg, complex renovation

## Press

Elle Decoration UK, Architectural Digest Polska, Vogue Poland, Yellowtrace, AD Spain, AD Germany, Elle Indonesia, Domino, Gestalten (Penthouse Syndrome book)
